title: Dark Matter Origins
description: A dark power progression mod. Consume the Dark Orb, complete quests, gain XP, and unlock dark abilities like wings and a scythe. How far will you go?
body: Dark Matter is a power progression mod that adds a dark ability system to Minecraft. When you join a world, you receive a Dark Orb — consume it to unlock the darkness within. Complete quests like mining, killing mobs, and trading to earn XP and level up your Dark Matter level. As you grow stronger, unlock powerful rewards including Dark Wings and the Darkened Scythe. Press K to open your Dark Matter menu and track your progress through the skill tree. How powerful will you become?
